title: Is My Face Red?
writer: Ben Markson, Allen Rivkin, Casey Robinson
actors: Helen Twelvetrees, Ricardo Cortez, Jill Esmond
plot: Poster writes a gossip column for the Morning Gazette. He will write about anyone and everyone as long as he gets the credit. He gets most of his information from his gal, Peggy who is a showgirl. When Bill sees Tony stab Angelo S...
